mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_price (`date`, variety, region, province, area_type, price, change_val, remark, unit, source) VALUES
(#{item.date}, #{item.variety}, #{item.region}, #{item.province}, #{item.areaType}, #{item.price}, #{item.changeVal}, #{item.remark}, #{item.unit}, #{item.source})
AS new ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE price = new.price, change_val = new.change_val, remark = new.remark, province = new.province, area_type = new.area_type, unit = new.unit
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT variety FROM t_price WHERE source = 'liangdawang' AND `date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY variety

SELECT region FROM t_price WHERE variety = #{variety} AND source = 'liangdawang' AND `date` = (SELECT MAX(`date`) FROM t_price WHERE variety = #{variety} AND source = 'liangdawang') ORDER BY price ASC LIMIT 3
